name: A Pale Light
description: This model gains the following abilities:

granted_abilities.name: Forever Doomed
granted_abilities.text: This model treats any black jokers it flips or cheats as red jokers.

granted_abilities.name: Combat Finesse
granted_abilities.text: When this model is targeted with a (melee) action, the attacking model's duel cannot be cheated.

triggers.name: Secrets Revealed in the Light
triggers.text: Remove all Scheme markers within (m)1" of the made marker.

granted_actions.name: Pale Blade
granted_actions.costs_and_restrictions: If the target has half of its maximum health or more, this action receives a (-).

triggers.name: Burst of Speed
triggers.text: Move this model up to 5", ignoring other models. Enemy models moved through this way are dealt 1 damage.

triggers.name: Mutilate
triggers.text: When resolving, if the target has a Slow token, deal +1 damage. Otherwise, it gains a Slow token.

extraction_notes: The Fallow Night action has a trigger but no stat line, making it a tactical action with no explicit TN specified.
The limitations field shows '-' which indicates no limitations.
